allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) if isinstance\(data, list\) and data: p = data[0] print\('id:', p.get\('id'\)\) print\('date:', p.get\('date'\)\) print\('title:', p.get\('title',{}\).get\('rendered',''\)[:60]\) print\('excerpt:', p.get\('excerpt',{}\).get\('rendered',''\)[:60]\) img = p.get\('_embedded',{}\).get\('wp:featuredmedia',[{}]\)[0].get\('source_url',''\) print\('image:', img[:80]\) else: print\('unexpected response:', str\(data\)[:200]\) ")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; o=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('meta_data:', json.dumps\(o.get\('meta_data',[]\), indent=2\)\)")
